memoryArtifacts.headline: Biography
memoryArtifacts.description: From 1316, he acted as regent in the county, imprisoned his father in 1318, and governed as "son of the Count". When in 1326 his father died, he styled himself Count of Guelders and Count of Zutphen. …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Troubled Marriage, Death
memoryArtifacts.description: According to Historica.fandom.com/wiki/reginald_II_of_Guelders He was of the House of Lamen. In 1332 he married Eleanor of Woodstock. She was very eager to please him, which annoyed him. Eleanor had a …

popularStory.headline: Biography
popularStory.description: From 1316, he acted as regent in the county, imprisoned his father in 1318, and governed as "son of the Count". When in 1326 his father died, he styled himself Count of Guelders and Count of Zutphen. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Reinoud II von Geldern於1295年9月7日出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德阿恩姆時，他的父親Rainald I von Geldern40歲，母親Marguerite de Flandres30歲。他於1311年1月11日與Sophia van Berthout在荷蘭利包格洛爾蒙德結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1316年被列為regent in het graafschap van gelre。他去世於1343年10月12日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德阿恩姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reinoud II von Geldern于1295年9月7日出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德阿恩姆时，他的父亲Rainald I von Geldern40岁，母亲Marguerite de Flandres30岁。他于1311年1月11日与Sophia van Berthout在荷兰利包格洛爾蒙德结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1316年被列为regent in het graafschap van gelre。他去世于1343年10月12日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在荷兰蓋爾德藍德阿恩姆。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Reinoud II von Geldern was born on 7 September 1295, in Arnhem, Gelderland, Netherlands, his father, Rainald I von Geldern, was 40 and his mother, Marguerite de Flandres, was 30. He married Sophia van Berthout on 11 January 1311, in Roermond, Limburg, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. In 1316, at the age of 21, his occupation is listed as regent in het graafschap van gelre. He died on 12 October 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Arnhem, Gelderland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reinoud II von Geldern est né le 7 septembre 1295, à Arnhem, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Rainald I von Geldern, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Flandres, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Sophia van Berthout le 11 janvier 1311, à Roermond, Limbourg, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. En 1316, à l’âge de 21 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est regent in het graafschap van gelre. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Arnhem, Gueldre, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reinoud II von Geldern am 7. September 1295 in Arnhem, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rainald I von Geldern 40 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Flandres 30. Er hat am 11. Januar 1311 in Roermond, Limburg, Niederlande Sophia van Berthout geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. 1316, als er 21 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als regent in het graafschap van gelre aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1343 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Arnhem, Geldern, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reinoud II von Geldern è nato il il 7 settembre 1295 nel Arnhem, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Rainald I von Geldern, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Flandres, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Sophia van Berthout il 11 gennaio 1311, nel Roermond, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Nel 1316, all'età di 21 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come regent in het graafschap van gelre. Morì il 12 ottobre 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Arnhem, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Reinoud II von Geldernが1295年9月7日にオランダジェルダーランドアルンヘムで生まれた時，父Rainald I von Geldernは40歳，母Marguerite de Flandresは30歳であった。1311年1月11日にオランダリンブルグロールモンドでSophia van Berthoutと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。1316年，21歳の時，職業はregent in het graafschap van gelreと記録されている。彼は1343年10月12日に故郷で48歳で死去し，オランダジェルダーランドアルンヘムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reinoud II von Geldern(이)가 1295년 9월 7일 네덜란드 글델랜드 아헤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rainald I von Geldern(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Flandres(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1311년 1월 11일 네덜란드 림버그 로몽에서 Sophia van Berthout(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1316년, 21세의 나이로 그의 직업은 regent in het graafschap van gelre이었다. 그는 1343년 10월 12일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 글델랜드 아헤에 묻혔다.

mn.7 September 1295–12 October 1343: 1295 оны Есдүгээр сарын 7–1343 оны Аравдугаар сарын 12

pt.7 September 1295–12 October 1343: 7 de setembro de 1295–12 de outubro de 1343
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reinoud II von Geldern nasceu em 7 de setembro de 1295, em Arnhem, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Rainald I von Geldern, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Flandres, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Sophia van Berthout em 11 de janeiro de 1311, em Roermond, Limburgo, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Em 1316, com 21 anos, sua profissão aparece como regent in het graafschap van gelre. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Arnhem, Gheldria, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reinoud II von Geldern родился 7 сентября 1295 г. в местности арнем, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Rainald I von Geldern было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Flandres, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophia van Berthout 11 января 1311 г. в местности роирмонд, лимбург, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1316 году, в возрасте 21 год,  он работал по профессии regent in het graafschap van gelre. Он умер 12 октября 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности арнем, джелдирланд, Нидерланды.

sm.1326-1339: mai le 1326 e o'o I le 1339
sm.1339-1343: mai le 1339 e o'o I le 1343

es.7 September 1295–12 October 1343: 7 de septiembre de 1295–12 de octubre de 1343
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reinoud II von Geldern nació el 7 de septiembre de 1295, en Arnhem, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Rainald I von Geldern, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Flandres, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sophia van Berthout el 11 de enero de 1311, en Roermond, Limburg, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. En 1316, a la edad de 21 años, su ocupación registrada era regent in het graafschap van gelre. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1343, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Arnhem, Gelderland, Países Bajos.
